bead.title: bench-pr-A3: bash runner skeleton + listing subcommands + --plan mode
bead.description:
Create scripts/benchmark/benchmark (no extension, executable bash) with arg parsing, listing subcommands, profile/bench-set/concurrency-group YAML reading, matrix expansion, preflight that triggers harbor-runner rebuild, and --plan output. No execution loop in this bead (covered by A4).

FILES:
  - scripts/benchmark/benchmark (new bash script).

DISPATCH:
  ./benchmark <subcommand> ... with subcommands: profiles | bench-sets | task-executors | harness-adapters | validate | preflight | (no subcommand = run mode).

RUN-MODE FLAGS (only --plan is required for this bead):
  --profile P[,P2,...] --bench-set B[,B2,...] [--plan] [--out DIR]

MATRIX EXPANSION:
  - Read profile/bench-set/concurrency-group YAML with `yq -o=json`.
  - profile × task × rep -> ordered cell list. Resolve `tasks_from:` (path relative to bench-set file) AND inline `tasks:`.
  - PR C will finalize the bench-set schema; for this bead default `task_executor` to `harbor` when `framework == terminal-bench`.

PREFLIGHT:
  - `./benchmark preflight` invokes scripts/benchmark/build-harbor-runner.sh if cached image label sha differs from current source sha.

PLAN OUTPUT:
  - `--plan` prints the matrix (one line per cell) to stdout and exits 0; creates NO files; builds NO Docker images.

DEPENDS ON A1 (preflight references the image build) and A2 (listing subcommands enumerate harness-adapters/ and task-executors/).

ACCEPTANCE:
  1. ./scripts/benchmark/benchmark profiles, bench-sets, harness-adapters, task-executors each list available entries.
  2. ./scripts/benchmark/benchmark --plan --profile sindri-lucebox --bench-set tb-2-1-canary prints the matrix, creates NO files, builds NO Docker images.
  3. ./scripts/benchmark/benchmark preflight rebuilds harbor-runner only when sha differs.
  4. shellcheck passes on the new script.
bead.acceptance: AC2 satisfies AC1 of the parent bead. All 4 commands in the description ACCEPTANCE block pass.
